description: Format the bilingual (English/Spanish) Non-Disclosure Agreement draft at ~/Documents/TextDocuments/bilingual_nda_draft.docx into a professional client-ready document. Apply Times New Roman font to the entire document. The document titles in the first row ('MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT' and 'ACUERDO DE CONFIDENCIALIDAD MUTUA') must be Centered, Bold, and 14pt. All numbered Section Headings (e.g., '1. Confidential Information', '2. Obligations' and their Spanish equivalents) should be Bold and 12pt. In the body text, format the defined terms 'Confidential Information' and 'Información Confidencial' as Bold and Italic. In the signature blocks, Right-align the paragraphs starting with 'Date:' and 'Fecha:'. Save the final document to ~/Documents/TextDocuments/bilingual_nda_final.docx.
